0.content:
## Instantiations & Adoption
All codespace instantiation events — real users, Orbital CI, GitHub Actions CI, and local containers. Geo-located by IP.

1.title: Total Instantiations (7d)
1.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Real User Codespaces (7d)
2.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter `content.codespace.type` == "github-codespaces"
| summarize total = count()

3.title: Error Rate (7d)
3.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| summarize total = count(), errors = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` != "0" and isNotNull(`content.codespace.errors`))
| fieldsAdd errorRate = round(toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| fields errorRate

4.title: Active Repositories (7d)
4.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| summarize repos = countDistinct(`content.repository.name`)

5.title: Instantiations by Type
5.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| summarize count = count(), by:{`content.codespace.type`}
| sort count desc

6.title: Instantiations Over Time (by type)

7.title: By Repository (top 20)
7.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| summarize count = count(), errors = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` != "0" and isNotNull(`content.codespace.errors`)), by:{`content.repository.name`}
| sort count desc
| limit 20

8.title: By Country (real user + GH Actions)
8.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "github-codespaces", "github-workflow", "local-docker-container")
| filter isNotNull(`content.geo.country.name`)
| summarize count = count(), by:{`content.geo.country.name`, `content.geo.continent.name`}
| sort count desc
| limit 25

9.title: Real Codespace Instantiations — Location Detail
9.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter `content.codespace.type` == "github-codespaces"
| fields timestamp, `content.repository.name`, `content.codespace.arch`, `content.codespace.creation`, `content.codespace.errors`, `content.geo.city.name`, `content.geo.country.name`, `content.geo.continent.name`
| sort timestamp desc

10.title: Errors by Repository
10.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter `content.codespace.errors` != "0"
| filter isNotNull(`content.codespace.errors`)
| summarize errors = count(), by:{`content.repository.name`, `content.codespace.type`}
| sort errors desc
| limit 20
